Pastel-haired soft-plastic doll with oversized head stirs frosting in giant mixing bowl inside cupcake-cottage kitchen, icing bag and candy sprinkles scattered on gingham counter.
Two rooted-hair dolls in calico dresses spread gingham blanket among oversized foam strawberries, miniature wicker picnic basket open with tiny pastel cupcakes inside.
Scented figurine in striped tights walks beside tiny pastel pony across rainbow-striped arched bridge, cotton-candy clouds in background under warm golden-hour lighting.
Three berry-themed dolls in apron skirts hold steaming miniature pies at lace-covered booth, pastel bunting strung overhead at country fair playset scene.
Yarn-haired doll in giant bonnet skips down curved path under oversized swirled lollipop trees, pink and yellow candy forest stretching into soft-focus background.
Two soft-plastic dolls perch on miniature stools at ice-cream-parlor counter, pastel sundaes topped with tiny cherries and whipped-cream dollops before them.
Dolls in pantaloons sit in oversized petal-shaped chairs around miniature table, sipping from rosebud teacups in flower-garden playset with faded-catalog warm glow.
Rosy-cheeked figurine holds giant pink-and-blue cotton-candy cone at carnival playset, pastel ferris-wheel spinning behind striped booth under nostalgic lamp-glow lighting.
Princess doll in dessert-themed gown waves from frosting-turret atop cupcake castle, candy-stone path winding below through pastel-rainbow landscape miniature.
Two dolls in matching nightgowns mid-pillow-fight inside cupcake-liner bed playset, ruffled edges towering overhead with heart-shaped quilt and tiny pastel pillows scattered.
Yarn-haired doll in gingham pinafore stands at gingerbread-cottage doorway holding candy-cane, icing-drip trim along roofline with gumdrop path leading through powdered-sugar snow.
Three soft-plastic dolls holding hands spin in circle under stripe rainbow arching over pastel-meadow playset, rooted hair flying mid-twirl with buttercup clusters scattered below.
Scented figurine waves from cloud-carriage pulled by tiny pastel pony, fluffy cotton batting shaped as chariot with satin ribbon reins trailing through candy-colored sky backdrop.
Two rosy-cheeked dolls in apron skirts stand behind candy-shop counter, miniature glass jars filled with gumdrops and tiny metal scoop resting beside penny-candy display.
Bonnet-wearing doll waves from heart-shaped hot-air-balloon basket, pastel ribbons trailing downward over miniature treetops in warm golden-hour playset lighting below.
Soft-plastic figurines mid-glide across doll-sized frozen pond, yarn scarves flying behind with frosted-tree backdrop and tiny ice-skates molded to ankle-boots.
Calico-dressed doll gathers tulips in wicker basket through pink-tulip field playset, bow-tied apron strings fluttering with oversized blooms towering overhead in soft focus.
Rooted-hair figurine brushes pastel yarn at heart-shaped vanity mirror inside cake-slice bedroom, miniature cupcake lamp glowing on frosting-textured nightstand beside her.
Two dolls lean from sugar-trimmed windows of dessert-train caboose, cotton-puff steam clouds rising behind as candy-rail tracks wind through pastel landscape playset.
Pantaloon-clad dolls climb tiny ladders to oversized foam strawberries in berry-patch harvest scene, full wicker baskets resting at ladder-feet with gingham bows tied.
Soft-plastic doll in striped tights peers from rainbow-ladder treehouse nestled in pastel-cloud foliage, yarn kite-tail streaming downward through cotton-batting sky in nostalgic lamp-glow.
Two rosy-cheeked figurines arrange miniature cupcake tower in candy-stripe bakery window, scalloped awning overhead with tiny rolling pin and flour-sack props on gingham counter.
Berry-themed dolls and oversized teddy-bear figurines share pastel mini-cakes on quilted blanket picnic, honey pot tipped beside wicker basket in golden-hour meadow playset.
Bonnet-wearing figurines in matching nightcaps hold mugs topped with marshmallow mounds beside miniature fireplace, knitted blanket draped over heart-shaped chair in cozy cottage scene.
Yarn-haired doll braids rooted-mane of tiny pink unicorn in pastel meadow, woven flower-crown resting nearby on moss with buttercup clusters scattered through soft-focus background.
